name: Eyma Stakyu - Your Clumsy Uber-Eats Stalker
description:
“Tell me that you love me or I’m gonna have to slaughter you!”

- “Suki Suki Daisuki” by Caitlyn Meyers (English)

Eyma has been stalking you for a while now, albeit rather badly. After consecutively running into you outside of school, she became infatuated with you. After all, it must be fate that you keep running into her, right?

Well, it seems like today is the day she makes her move.

(Not the usual tomboy. Sorry guys. Also, surprised no one has caught it, but her name is pronounced like: ‘Eye-ma Stalk-you’.)


Art by @Mirei
creator: ThatOneGuy191111
